utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan contains all five of these items. Each one is fully specified with details and costs: (1) health_coverage includes both physical and mental health with cost info, (2) property_coverage includes home/contents and high-value assets with cost info, (3) travel_coverage includes business travel, medical evacuation, family coverage, and cost, (4) additional_services includes concierge medical, executive, and pre-existing coverage with cost, (5) total_budget includes monthly, annual, previous cost comparisons, savings, and efficiency. All items are present and have full details as specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan repeatedly references a bundled 'Complete Optimized Portfolio' that includes physical and mental health coverage, property protection for luxury items, and global business travel coverage. According to the ground-truth ratings, the ideal and highest-rated plans matching these descriptions are: EliteCare Premium Plan or PrimeCare Premium Plan (rating 10) for physical and mental health, EliteHome Premium Coverage (rating 10) for property coverage of luxury items, and EliteTravel Premium Plan (rating 10) for global travel coverage. The additional services described—24/7 concierge medical services, executive priority claims processing, and pre-existing condition coverage—correspond to high-value add‑ons such as Specialist Access, Wellness Programs, Business Travel Support, Premium Medical Network, and 24/7 Travel Assistance, all rated 10. Therefore, each component of the bundled portfolio aligns with the top-rated options in the ground truth.
